PreToolUse.description: PRForge Bash safety gate — blocks unsafe git push/PR actions before they run
PRForge phase boundary enforcer — blocks illegal phase transitions in state.json writes

PostToolUse.description: PRForge GitNexus intelligence — prompts intelligence gathering after read operations when state is active
PRForge blast radius tracker — computes blast radius after file edits
PRForge phase injector — after state.json writes, injects mandatory reminder to read the new phase playbook
PRForge discipline check — after Write/Edit/MultiEdit, verifies coding discipline compliance

_install_note: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT must resolve to the prforge plugin directory (containing this hooks/ folder). Verify with: echo ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. If hooks silently fail, check this path first.
